ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_code" INTEGER /* Commodity code assigned by international standards */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commodity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the commodity (e.g., Clothing, Electronics) */,
  "hs_code" TEXT /* Harmonized System (HS) code for customs purposes */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the commodity */,
  "commodity_group" TEXT /* Commodity group (e.g., Electronics, Clothing, Food) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code or abbreviation for the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading partner */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading partner */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number of the trading partner */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the partner is based */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the partner */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the partner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incoterms" (
  "incoterm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Incoterm */,
  "incoterm_code" TEXT /* Code for the Incoterm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Incoterm */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the Incoterm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incoterm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes_of_transport" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode of transport */,
  "mode_code" TEXT /* Code for the mode of transport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode of transport */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mode of transport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the log entry belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Shipped, Delivered, Invoice Created) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "event_user" INTEGER /* User who triggered the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_event_user FOREIGN KEY ("event_user") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., logistics manager, sales team, compliance officer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the transaction was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code or abbreviation for the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language used in the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
